message:
fix(runtime): Add Phase 2 numeric test fixes

- Export pyStrFromAny and pyFloatFromAny from runtime.zig
- Handle error unions in __int__() and __index__() method calls
- Add adjust_int_max_str_digits stub context manager for test.support
- Add Fraction type check in getFloorDivSemantics for runtime dispatch

Baseline tests: 6/6 pass (80 test cases)
test_int_literal: Now compiles and passes
test_int: Still has complex codegen issues (comptime type, int_class)
